rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 1. PETITIONER MOSSER COMPANIES Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Adminstative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief. Continued to December 20, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 27, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: M. A. KARAH VS. DOUR ABDELHAK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF M. KARAH Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint. GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE M SCONBERG VS. JASON WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Notice. Continued to January 14, 2014. Opposition and reply are due in accordance with new hearing date. Temporary Restraining Order remains in effect. Defendants shall post all the rental income generated by the Property (November 22, 2013 through January 14, 2013) with the Court within 5 days of receipt of such income. Defendants shall file declarations under penalty of perjury on January 10, 2013 stating that all income was posted with the Court. Funds shall be distributed to parties/receiver per the order of the Court regarding Motion for Appointment of Receiver. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOYCE LOHRE VS. JAMES QUEDADO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JAMES QUEDADO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions. Continued to November 25, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to the court no later than 9:30 am on November 22, 2013. Any future violations of SFLR 2.6B or C will result in motion being taken off calendar. = (501/REQ)
